description: Composition Dark blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one and metallic buttons on the pocket ends, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand badge on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist and has a metal zipper and button closure Fit Regular fit Mid rise Straight leg Wash care Turn inside out before washing and drying Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron If you're a denim person, then this dark blue denim trouser from wrangler is perfect for you. With a mid waist and great regular fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with casual shirts and sandals or funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 44" Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips: 40"
